rules.description: Basic SKU public IP addresses are retiring. The Standard and High-Performance SKUs that only accept Basic SKU public IP addresses are retiring.
rules.query: where (tostring(properties.sku.name) in ('Standard') or tostring(properties.sku.name) in ('HighPerformance') ) and tostring(properties.gatewayType) contains ('Vpn')
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: To improve security, the platform only supports Microsoft-registered VPN clients for point-to-site connections with Microsoft Entra ID authentication.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: In active-active configuration, both instances of the VPN gateway establish site-to-site (S2S) VPN tunnels to your on-premise VPN device. When a planned maintenance or unplanned event happens to one gateway instance, traffic is automatically switched over to the other active IPsec tunnel.
rules.query: where properties.gatewayType =~ 'vpn' | extend gatewayType = properties.gatewayType, vpnType = properties.vpnType, connections = properties.connections, activeactive=properties.activeActive | where activeactive == false
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Due to the lack of redundancy, lower availability, and potential higher costs associated with other failover solution; the platform is transitioning all SKUs without availability zones to SKUs with availability zones.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
